title: Add REKTY AI to bots
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [REKTY AI](https://github.com/rekty/Rekty-AI) to bots
- REKTY AI description not provided.

Fixes #11987

gist.headline: New Bot in the Garden: REKTY AI
gist.blurb: A new bot has sprouted in the community greenhouse! REKTY AI just joined the Pollinations ecosystem.
gist.summary: Added the community-built REKTY AI bot to the Pollinations app directory and greenhouse.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and interact with REKTY AI through the community apps showcase.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee welcoming a new robot friend (REKTY AI) into a lush digital greenhouse filled with code-plants.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's hat, welcoming a cute, slightly battered little robot into a lush digital greenhouse. The robot has a CRT monitor head with a friendly glitchy smile. Code-plants sprout from lime green (#ecf874) flower pots around them. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's hat, welcoming a cute, slightly battered little robot into a lush digital greenhouse. The robot has a CRT monitor head with a friendly glitchy smile. Code-plants sprout from lime green (#ecf874) flower pots around them.
